title: Kidplokio 2pc Space Blasters with Flashing Lights and Sounds Superhero Cinch Bag
description:
Does your child love all things space and superheroes? This Kidplokio Space Blaster and Cinch Bag Bundle set is a great gift idea this holiday season! The space blaster toy features flashing colorful lights and fantastic blasting sound effects, and the superhero-themed cinch bag comes with an easy-to-use drawstring cinch closure for on-the-go fun. As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blaster to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance! Each drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, and a water bottle

Kidplokio 2pc Space Blasters with Flashing Lights and Sounds Superhero Cinch Bag

Does your child love all things space and superheroes? This Kidplokio Space Blaster and Cinch Bag Bundle set is a great gift idea this holiday season! The set comes with 2 space blaster toys, each featuring flashing colorful lights and fantastic blasting sound effects, and the superhero-themed cinch bag comes with an easy-to-use drawstring cinch closure for on-the-go fun.

Key Features

  • DUAL SPACE BLASTER TOYS - Includes 2 blasters with flashing colorful lights and immersive blasting sound effects for exciting pretend space battles against aliens and villains.
  • SUPERHERO-THEMED CINCH BAG - 18” x 13” drawstring tote with easy cinch closure, perfect for securing school supplies, books, notebooks, water bottles, and sporting gear on the go.
  • ADJUSTABLE COMFORT FIT - Customizable cinch straps ensure a comfortable fit for most kids, ideal for active play or daily use.
  • DURABLE WATER-RESISTANT MATERIAL - Made of tough polyester to protect contents from rain, keeping school materials and toys safe in any weather.
  • ULTIMATE HOLIDAY GIFT BUNDLE - Combines space-themed blasters and a versatile bag for endless imaginative solar system missions and practical storage.

Product Specifications

  • MPN: KPL-SPBG3PC-BN
  • UPC: 810131703509

As defenders of our solar system and unknown galaxies beyond, kids will need the Kidplokio Sonic Space Blasters to keep pretend play space missions running at top speed! Aliens and evil galactic villains won’t stand a chance!

Each drawstring tote bag measures 18” by 13” and can easily hold your child’s school supplies and sporting gear like binders, school books, notebooks, accessories, a water bottle and more. The bag features an easy-to-use cinch closure to ensure supplies stay secured in the bag when not in use.

The adjustable cinch strap design provides customizable comfort that will fit most kids. The bag itself is made of durable water-resistant polyester to protect your child’s school materials and supplies, rain or shine. Make sure to grab this ultimate Space Toy Bundle Gift Set this holiday season for your outer space fanatic!
